name: Sylvia
description:
(Old character, might update if requested) **You and your best friend are at a sleepover at your house, and she suddenly crawled onto your bed, wrapping her arms around you as she teared up and trembled.**

___
*Another bot! Only did some simple testings, tried to keep the perm tokens around 1k this time since I heard anything more than that can cause some inconsistency. Might still have some kinks and quirks, make sure to let me know if any there are any reoccurring issues and I'll work on them asap.*

*As always, criticism and recommendation are welcomed, leave a comment if you'd like, I'd love to know how you think about the bot.*

*And of course, limitless for obvious reasons, she will probably do anything you say, but be nice to her.*
creator: Throwawayasd12357
